backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a Machine Part Tracker app, including user profile management, machine CRUD operations with access control, and blob storage/authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to a new actor state by initializing an empty contacts list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four post-login contact details flow features (navigate to AddContactDetailsPage, display user name, form with save/skip, navigate to dashboard after) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing UI components, hooks, utilities, and pages added or updated for the Machine Part Tracker app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles and OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Machine Part Tracker', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that detects fresh login via identity changes and conditionally renders AddContactDetailsPage or Dashboard, persisting the contact-details-done state in localStorage per principal.
Dialog modal component for adding a new machine, using MachineFormFields for input, validating the form, and calling the useAddMachine mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: AlertDialog confirmation component that prompts the user before deleting a machine, calling the useDeleteMachine mutation and showing a loading spinner during deletion.
frontend/src/components/DueTodayAlertBan: Displays a dismissible animated alert banner warning that one or more machine parts are due for replacement within 24 hours, listing each affected machine by name and number.
frontend/src/components/EditMachineModal: A dialog modal that pre-populates a form with an existing machine's data and submits updates via the `useUpdateMachine` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ForgotPasswordDi: A dialog that collects a user's phone number, validates it, and simulates sending a password reset link, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/MachineCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single machine showing its status, dates, and part info, with action buttons to edit, delete, reschedule, or mark the part as done.
frontend/src/components/MachineFormField: Reusable form field set for machine data entry including name, machine number, part type (via dropdown), last replaced date, and next due date, with a shared validation export.
frontend/src/components/OverdueAlertBann: Displays a dismissible warning banner listing all machines whose parts are overdue for replacement, filtered from the provided machines array.
frontend/src/components/PhoneLoginForm.t: A React form component for phone number + password login with validation, loading state, and a success confirmation view.
frontend/src/components/RescheduleDateMo: A dialog modal that allows users to set a new next-due date for a machine part, using the useRescheduleNextDue mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SessionLogsPanel: A card panel that fetches and displays audit log entries (login/logout events) with timestamps and user identifiers in a scrollable list.
frontend/src/components/StatsBar.tsx: A responsive stats grid that summarizes machine maintenance statuses (total, on schedule, due soon, due today, overdue) with icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A styled badge component that displays a machine's maintenance status (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue) with a colored dot and animated styles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including machines, audit logs, user profiles, and contacts, using the IC actor for all API calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Barlow fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark industrial themes including status and animation utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AddContactDetailsPage: Onboarding page that collects and validates a user's full name, phone, and email, then saves them via the saveContact mutation before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying machine cards, alert banners, stats, and session logs, with login/logout handling via Internet Identity and audit event logging.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting between IC bigint nanosecond timestamps and JS Dates, computing machine status (ok/due-soon/due-today/overdue), and formatting dates and principal IDs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Barlow), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Machine Part Tracker app, tracking existing features (post-login contact details flow) and pending feature requests (backend storage of contact details).
